CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Off Calendar

Ntc And Application On Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Sep-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Stephen L. Porter, Esq., for Plaintiff Whitehead & Porter

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Whitehead & Porter's Application For Writ of Attachment is ordered off calendar. The Application For Writ of Attachment was not filed until September 7, 2006. C.C.P. Section 1005(b) requires that all moving and supporting papers shall be served and filed at least 16 court days before the hearing. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
